scripts.db:setup: npm run db:migrate -w @typologos/server && npm run db:seed -w @typologos/server
scripts.corpus:import: npm run corpus:download -w @typologos/server && npm run corpus:import -w @typologos/server
scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,web -c blue,magenta "npm run dev:server" "npm run dev:web"
